sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 57:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 57:1
items.html: The coarseness in the Partzuf is regarded as its internality, because it is the place of the extension of the abundance.
